name: Sobreviva
short_description: Awaken the COMPETITOR inside you! Destroy enemies with your strategy and skills on an island that floats in the sky.
detailed_description: Embark on an exciting journey to survive on a hostile island. With quick reflexes and smart strategies, you must fight to reach the central island and face your enemies. With a wide variety of maps and skins to choose from, each match is unique. Win matches to unlock new skins and increase your chances of survival. With instant lives and a store full of powerful weapons, you have everything you need to face the challenges ahead. Fight in multiple rounds to prove that you are the best player and blow up your enemies with devastating grenades. With a tutorial system for new players, anyone can get in on the action. Do you have what it takes to survive?
about_the_game: Embark on an exciting journey to survive on a hostile island. With quick reflexes and smart strategies, you must fight to reach the central island and face your enemies. supported_languages: Portuguese - Brazil, English, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Russian
